title: Justify-AI – Explainable Hate Analysis
description: Explainable, multilingual hate‑analysis framework built with classical NLP and Naive Bayes, combining lexical, causal, and demographic signals for interpretable risk scoring.
concept: Justify‑AI addresses the need for transparent, interpretable hate speech detection without relying on black‑box transformers. It supports multiple Indian languages with clear risk breakdowns, making AI decisions auditable and understandable for research and moderation workflows.
architecture: Classical NLP pipeline: Language Detection → Language‑specific preprocessing (tokenization, stemming, lemmatization) → Hate lexicon matching with severity spans → Rule‑based causality extraction → Demographic bias auditing → Composite risk scoring → FastAPI backend + visual dashboard.
differentiators: Pure statistical NLP—no transformers, fully interpretable pipeline
Multilingual support: English, Hindi, Marathi, Bhojpuri, Marwari
Transparent risk scoring with lexical + causal + bias breakdowns
Visual dashboard wired directly to backend analytical outputs

title: Local AI Dashcam – Incident Explainer
description: Fully local, privacy‑preserving dashcam incident analysis using YOLO11, SORT tracking, optical flow, and local VLMs via Ollama—no cloud APIs required.
concept: Solves automated incident detection and explanation from dashcam footage while maintaining complete privacy. Ideal for scenarios where sensitive video data cannot leave local infrastructure, delivering intelligent analysis with zero internet dependency.
architecture: 5‑phase pipeline: (1) FFmpeg keyframe extraction with motion scoring, (2) Incident detection via YOLO11+SORT+Farneback optical flow fusion, (3) Multi‑modal VLM narration using MiniCPM‑V + Mistral 7B via Ollama, (4) Privacy filtering with face/LP blurring, (5) Gradio UI + ReportLab PDF export.
differentiators: 100% offline operation—no cloud APIs or internet required
Multi‑modal AI: combines object tracking, optical flow, and VLMs
Automatic privacy enforcement with face and license plate blurring
Academic‑grade evaluation with BLEU/ROUGE metrics and ablation studies

title: NyayaAI – AI Legal Assistant
description: Full‑stack AI‑powered legal assistant with RAG, LangChain, Gemini, and intelligent web search—designed for context‑aware legal Q&A.
concept: NyayaAI addresses the challenge of making legal information accessible and understandable. Traditional legal research is time‑consuming and requires expertise. This AI‑powered assistant provides context‑aware, intelligent legal Q&A by combining retrieval‑augmented generation with real‑time web search capabilities.
architecture: RAG pipeline with LangChain orchestration, Gemini LLM, vector database for document embeddings, and DuckDuckGo search integration. Supports file uploads (PDF, DOCX, TXT) for contextual answers and maintains conversation memory per session.
differentiators: Context‑aware legal Q&A with source citations
Hybrid retrieval combining local knowledge and web search
Document upload for contextual answers
Full‑stack implementation with intuitive UI and local conversation storage

title: VaniCure – AI Respiratory Diagnostics
description: Offline‑first medical screening app using deep learning to analyze respiratory audio (coughs, breathing) for TB and Asthma risk prediction—designed for remote clinics with zero cloud dependency.
concept: Solves accessible respiratory diagnostics in resource‑constrained settings by running full AI inference locally on‑device. Protects patient privacy with complete offline operation while delivering ensemble‑model predictions and multilingual triage support for health workers.
architecture: Multi‑model ensemble pipeline: (1) PANNs CNN14 for robust feature extraction, (2) YAMNet for fast anomaly detection, (3) Custom CNN‑BiLSTM for targeted respiratory classification. FastAPI backend with React frontend, localStorage patient records, dynamic outbreak alerting, and multilingual triage agent.
differentiators: Three‑model ensemble for robust, cross‑validated predictions
Complete offline operation—ideal for remote/low‑connectivity clinics
Dynamic outbreak alerting based on spatial case clustering
Multilingual triage agent (Hindi, Gujarati, Marathi, English) with exportable patient records

title: Urban Hive – Housing Society Management
description: Full‑stack housing society management platform with role‑based dashboards for Residents, Managers, and Workers—built with Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and vanilla frontend.
concept: Urban Hive digitises fragmented society operations (complaints, payments, visitors, amenities, notices) into a cohesive platform. Each role gets a tailored dashboard with precise controls, eliminating confusion and streamlining daily workflows.
architecture: REST API built with Node.js + Express, MongoDB with Mongoose ODM, JWT authentication with role guards. Frontend is static HTML/CSS/JS with role‑specific pages. Covers complaint lifecycle, payment demo, visitor approvals, amenity bookings, and in‑app notifications.
differentiators: Three distinct dashboards with granular permissions
End‑to‑end complaint, payment, visitor, and amenity workflows
JWT‑based authentication with role guards
Fully responsive and ready for deployment on Render + Atlas

title: MarvelTimeVault
description: Cinematic timeline browser for Marvel films with dual theme system (Gold / Iron Man) and smooth GSAP animations.
concept: MarvelTimeVault transforms movie timeline browsing into an immersive experience using advanced animation techniques and premium interaction design, with separate universes (MCU, FOX, SONY, Specials).
architecture: JSON‑driven content layer separates data from presentation. Animation‑first rendering with GSAP and ScrollTrigger. Dual themes with CSS custom properties. Firebase hosting ready.
differentiators: Cinematic UX engineering with 3D card tilt and parallax
Dual theme system (Luxurious Gold & Futuristic Iron Man)
Immersive timeline experience with smooth scroll
Persistent theme preference in localStorage

title: Tulsi Disease Detection
description: Deep learning‑based plant disease detection system for Tulsi (Holy Basil) with a web interface and API for image‑based diagnosis and treatment advice.
concept: Provides an accessible tool for farmers and gardeners to identify tulsi diseases using a custom CNN model, offering confidence scores, class probabilities, and treatment recommendations—all served via a user‑friendly web UI.
architecture: FastAPI server loading a trained TensorFlow CNN model. Frontend allows drag‑and‑drop image upload, displays diagnosis, confidence, probability distribution, and treatment advice. Training scripts and batch processing utilities included.
differentiators: Custom CNN model trained on tulsi disease dataset
Provides confidence scores and treatment advice
Drag‑and‑drop web interface
Training scripts with visualizations and model comparison

title: VeeraServe AI – AI Waiter Platform
description: Premium AI‑powered restaurant service platform with a multimodal AI waiter—supports text, voice, and vision interactions for a futuristic dining experience.
concept: Bridges the gap between traditional food ordering and modern AI assistance. Offers seamless interaction via chat, speech, and image upload, powered by local LLMs for privacy and speed.
architecture: React 18 frontend with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion. FastAPI backend with LangChain orchestration. Ollama runs Qwen2.5‑VL for vision and faster‑whisper for real‑time speech transcription. Admin dashboard for menu and order management.
differentiators: Multimodal interaction (text, voice, vision)
Fully local LLM inference via Ollama
Premium UI with 3D effects and micro‑animations
Real‑time ordering and admin dashboard

title: VoteChain – Blockchain E‑Voting System
description: Blockchain‑inspired e‑voting demo with Web UI (Java/Spark + MongoDB) and JavaFX desktop app—featuring hash chaining, RSA signatures, and tamper detection.
concept: Educational prototype demonstrating secure voting using blockchain principles: one‑vote‑per‑voter, tamper‑proof chain, and transparent results. Dual mode (web and desktop) showcases flexibility.
architecture: Two independent modes: (1) Web: Spark Java REST API with MongoDB, BCrypt password hashing, and auto‑seeding of elections; (2) Desktop: JavaFX app with local file persistence (blockchain.dat, voters.dat). Both use SHA‑256 hashing and RSA signatures for vote blocks.
differentiators: Dual mode: Web API + Desktop app
Tamper detection via hash chain
RSA digital signatures on vote blocks
Admin dashboard for chain validation and results

title: ResolvAI – Offline AI System
description: Privacy‑preserving AI tool for small businesses to draft professional, empathetic responses to customer complaints using local LLMs via Ollama—completely offline.
concept: ResolvAI solves the challenge of AI‑powered customer complaint resolution while maintaining complete data privacy. In scenarios where sensitive customer data cannot leave local infrastructure, this system provides intelligent resolution using fully offline LLM inference, aligned with business policies and profiles.
architecture: Streamlit frontend with Ollama LLM (Mistral 7B / Llama3) running locally. Uses LangChain for prompt engineering and policy‑aware response generation. Business profile and policies are integrated from text files. Conversation history is maintained during sessions.
differentiators: Complete offline operation for maximum privacy
No API dependencies or per‑request costs
Business‑profile‑aware empathetic responses
User‑friendly Streamlit interface with chat history

title: BharatNiti – Leadership Sim
description: AI‑driven political leadership simulation using live news to generate interactive decision‑making scenarios for experiential learning.
concept: BharatNiti converts live political news into structured decision‑making simulations, enabling users to practice leadership skills in realistic governance contexts.
architecture: News parsed into actors, conflicts, constraints, and objectives via LLM pipelines. Scenarios generated with prompt engineering and evaluated across leadership dimensions.
differentiators: Real‑world data to simulated governance conversion
Skill‑based AI feedback loops
Multi‑dimensional leadership assessment

title: Bias Detection AI
description: Multimodal fairness intelligence for implicit bias detection across text, audio, and video channels.
concept: This system targets implicit bias using multimodal inference to detect subconscious bias patterns in communication and behavior, informed by social psychology frameworks.
architecture: Multimodal inference across three channels: Text (BERT), Audio (Wav2Vec), Video (OpenPose). Bias metrics derived from social psychology frameworks.
differentiators: Real‑time bias nudging
Context‑sensitive fairness modeling
Psychology‑informed metrics

title: FaceMark – Attendance System
description: Modern web‑based face recognition attendance system using OpenCV, LBPH, and Haar Cascade—lightweight and explainable.
concept: Designed for environments where deep learning is overkill, FaceMark prioritizes simplicity, deployability, and explainability using classical computer vision techniques, automating attendance with a clean web interface.
architecture: Flask backend serving a web UI. Core system uses Haar Cascade for face detection and LBPH for recognition. Training dataset stored locally, attendance logged in CSV. Real‑time recognition and auto‑check‑in/out.
differentiators: Lightweight with no GPU dependency
Fully transparent recognition logic
Explainable AI approach
Web‑based interface with real‑time statistics

title: India Economic Dashboard – IndianPulse
description: Interactive economic dashboard for India with 11 key indicators, time‑series filtering, and exportable charts—built with Streamlit and Plotly.
concept: Transforms complex economic indicators into understandable, interactive visualizations for policy analysis and research. Provides real‑time data exploration with multiple chart types and theme support.
architecture: Streamlit frontend with Plotly charts. Backend data processing with Pandas and NumPy. CSV data generation utilities. Modular design with separate data processor and comparison modules.
differentiators: 11 economic indicators with category filtering
Interactive charts (line, area, bar, scatter)
Dark/light theme with persistent storage
Chart export as PNG and statistics cards

title: BMMCT – Community Platform
description: Official website for Bihar Mitra Mandal Charitable Trust—a community organization preserving Bihari culture in Gujarat since 2005.
concept: Provides a digital platform for cultural events, management profiles, donation, and volunteer registration. Features year‑based event galleries with modal viewer and lightbox, showcasing 20+ years of community service.
architecture: Static‑first, performance‑optimized architecture with Firebase Hosting. Year‑indexed event archival with sticky navigation. Custom modals and lightbox for media viewing. Fully responsive design with glassmorphism effects.
differentiators: Cultural‑scale content management with event galleries
Performance‑optimized static architecture
Year‑indexed event system with modal viewer
GPay QR integration for donations

title: Pal Classes – Learning Platform
description: Curriculum‑aligned learning platform with concept‑first content structuring for deeper understanding.
concept: Provides a curriculum‑aligned learning platform that organizes content by concepts rather than chapters, enabling deeper understanding and exam‑aligned pedagogy.
architecture: Concept‑first content structuring with progressive difficulty layering. Exam‑aligned pedagogy. Fully responsive static site.
differentiators: Exam‑aligned pedagogy
Concept‑first content structuring
Student‑centric learning paths

title: Godfather Chatbot
description: Persona‑faithful conversational AI using LLaMA 3 and Ollama—maintains character voice through prompt engineering.
concept: Maintains faithful character representation through advanced prompt engineering and temperature tuning, delivering immersive conversational experiences.
architecture: Prompt‑engineered persona locking with controlled randomness via temperature tuning. LangChain for conversation memory.
differentiators: Narrative‑consistent AI responses
Persona‑faithful character voice
Immersive conversational experience

title: Aeron Systems – Weather & Data Utilities
description: Two‑in‑one utility: a Flask‑based weather intelligence app with forecasts and maps, and a Streamlit‑based CSV analytics dashboard with AI‑generated insights.
concept: Provides live weather information (current, hourly, weekly) with AI‑powered insights, plus a data analytics tool for CSV upload, smart preprocessing, visualization, and Gemini‑generated summaries—all locally runnable.
architecture: Weather: Flask app with OpenWeatherMap API, Gemini fallback, Chart.js for charts, Leaflet for maps. Data: Streamlit app with pandas, Plotly, and Gemini API for summary insights. Both utilities are independent but bundled in one repository.
differentiators: Two independent utilities in one repo
Weather: live forecasts, interactive maps, AI insights
Data: CSV profiling, multiple chart types, AI summary
Both with Gemini integration and fallback mechanisms
